page: Amazon Web Services m8idb.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with a dedicated Intel processor operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 4 virtual CPUs derived from 2 physical cores, utilizing 2 threads per core.

The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. For local storage, the m8idb.xlarge includes a bundled 237 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume, which offers high-speed local block storage directly attached to the host.

Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU acceleration. This hardware profile is designed for general-purpose workloads, small to medium databases, caching layers, and development environments that require a balance of compute, memory, and fast local temporary storage.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idb.xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed by the Nitro hypervisor. Powered by a dedicated Intel processor running at 3.9 GHz, it delivers 4 vCPUs across 2 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system includes 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. A key feature of this instance is its bundled 237 GB NVMe SSD local instance store, which provides low-latency temporary storage. It also features a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is optimized for workloads requiring balanced compute and memory resources alongside high-speed local storage. It is suited for applications such as web serving, small-scale databases, and development environments.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idb.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, a 3.9 GHz Intel processor, and a bundled 237 GB NVMe SSD local instance store for low-latency temporary storage.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processing, 16 GB of memory, and high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
